text:
INCIDENT REPORT #003
Facility: Plant 7 - Baton Rouge
Asset: Centrifugal Compressor C-22
Severity: MEDIUM

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed oil leakage at the shaft seal
on the Centrifugal Compressor C-22. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 13.1 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause investigation is still open pending vendor teardown report.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Interim monitoring increased; formal RCA to follow within 10 business days.
